authoringIntent: Repository-authored articulated mechanical-product benchmark; no external image was used as reconstruction evidence.
allowedClaims: The brief defines intended serial articulation, product silhouette, material zones, tier limits, and protected identities.
Source and unit validation may prove implementation conformance to the authored brief.

Deterministic source tests may establish crown-side visibility intent, spring-contact geometry, separate solid-neck and hollow-boundary proxy bounds, continuity signatures, and workload counts without constituting visual or solver acceptance.

visualAcceptance.reason: No reference image, browser comparison sheet, or AI-vision acceptance record exists.
